form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 35-day let-up. Last start settled well back; won by a nose at this track March 11 over 1200m defeating Forerunner carrying 58.5kg at $8.50. Before that 4th of 14 at Sha Tin on February 19 over 1200m, 3 len behind Circuit Champion with 59.5kg at $16. Flew home to win last start and he's unbeaten at this track and trip.
